title: Carrier Trade Commodities
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Commodity_Localised, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Commodity_Localised ORDER BY value DESC
